data.content: Removed AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md prompt management from the product surface. Deleted the foolery prompt CLI and setup wizard, stopped packaging prompt templates, removed prompt-template assets/docs, and simplified doctor’s workflow fallback wording. Validation: bun run test -- doctor; bun run test -- help-cli; bun run lint (warnings only, no errors); bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build. Commit: ca614d8bf11d on branch work/foolery-79f6.
